## GroupNode class

An AST node that wraps a pattern in a regular expression group.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class GroupNode extends RegexNode 
```
**Extends:** [RegexNode](./pattern-builder.regexnode.md)

## Example


```ts
new GroupNode(new TextNode("foo"), "non-capturing").toString();
// "(?:foo)"
```
